parameters.query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, a.id AS assignment_id
FROM users u
JOIN assignments a ON a.user_id = u.id
JOIN positions p ON p.id = a.position_id
WHERE u.sso_id = '409809c4-382d-45bc-adbd-78f9be3cafd4'
  AND p.role_id = 1
LIMIT 1;

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO shifts_plan (assignment_id, shift_date, start_time, end_time, duration, created_at)
  SELECT
    {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }},
    CURRENT_DATE,
    '08:00:00',
    '20:00:00',
    12,
    NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM shifts_plan
    WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }}
      AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT id FROM ins),
  (SELECT id FROM shifts_plan
   WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.assignment_id }}
     AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
   LIMIT 1)
) AS id;

WITH
  wt AS (
    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RANDOM()) AS rn FROM work_types
  ),
  z AS (
    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RANDOM()) AS rn FROM zones
  ),
  c AS (
    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RANDOM()) AS rn FROM categories
  ),
  wt_cnt AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM work_types),
  z_cnt  AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM zones),
  c_cnt  AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM categories),
  task_defs AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES
      (1,  'Выкладка молочных продуктов',    'Выложить товары в секцию молочных, проверить сроки годности',              45,  false),
      (2,  'Проверка ценников',              'Проверить соответствие ценников текущему прайс-листу по всем секциям',    30,  true),
      (3,  'Уборка торгового зала',          'Влажная уборка торгового зала и прикассовой зоны',                        60,  false),
      (4,  'Приёмка товара на склад',        'Принять, пересчитать и разместить поступивший товар',                     90,  true),
      (5,  'Инвентаризация остатков',        'Пересчитать остатки по секции и сверить с системой учёта',                120, true),
      (6,  'Переоценка товаров',             'Обновить ценники в соответствии с новым прайс-листом',                   45,  false),
      (7,  'Проверка сроков годности',       'Изъять просроченный товар, оформить акт списания',                        60,  true),
      (8,  'Обучение нового сотрудника',     'Провести инструктаж по стандартам выкладки и обслуживания покупателей',  90,  false),
      (9,  'Расстановка ценников',           'Расставить ценники после переоценки по всей секции',                      30,  true),
      (10, 'Контроль выкладки',              'Проверить соответствие выкладки стандартам мерчендайзинга',               60,  false)
    ) AS t(seq, title, description, planned_minutes, requires_photo)
  ),
  task_with_time AS (
    SELECT
      seq, title, description, planned_minutes, requires_photo,
      '08:00:00'::time + (
        COALESCE(
          SUM(planned_minutes) OVER (ORDER BY seq ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING),
          0
        ) || ' minutes'
      )::interval AS time_start,
      '08:00:00'::time + (
        COALESCE(
          SUM(planned_minutes) OVER (ORDER BY seq ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
          0
        ) || ' minutes'
      )::interval AS time_end
    FROM task_defs
  )
INSERT INTO tasks (
  id, title, description, planned_minutes,
  creator_id, assignee_id,
  state, review_state, acceptance_policy, requires_photo,
  shift_id, work_type_id, zone_id, category_id,
  time_start, time_end, source, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
  gen_random_uuid(),
  twt.title,
  twt.description,
  twt.planned_minutes,
  {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.user_id }},
  {{ $('Get John Doe').item.json.user_id }},
  'NEW',
  'NONE',
  'MANUAL',
  twt.requires_photo,
  {{ $json.id }},
  (SELECT id FROM wt WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % wt_cnt.n + 1)),
  (SELECT id FROM z  WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % z_cnt.n + 1)),
  (SELECT id FROM c  WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % c_cnt.n + 1)),
  twt.time_start,
  twt.time_end,
  'WFM',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM task_with_time twt, wt_cnt, z_cnt, c_cnt
ORDER BY twt.seq
RETURNING id;

SELECT u.id AS user_id, a.id AS assignment_id
FROM users u
JOIN assignments a ON a.user_id = u.id
JOIN positions p ON p.id = a.position_id
WHERE u.sso_id = '409809c4-382d-45bc-adbd-78f9be3cafd4'
  AND p.role_id = 2
LIMIT 1;

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO shifts_plan (assignment_id, shift_date, start_time, end_time, duration, created_at)
  SELECT
    {{ $('Get John Doe Manager').item.json.assignment_id }},
    CURRENT_DATE,
    '08:00:00',
    '20:00:00',
    12,
    NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM shifts_plan
    WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe Manager').item.json.assignment_id }}
      AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT id FROM ins),
  (SELECT id FROM shifts_plan
   WHERE assignment_id = {{ $('Get John Doe Manager').item.json.assignment_id }}
     AND shift_date = CURRENT_DATE
   LIMIT 1)
) AS id;

    ) AS t(seq, title, description, planned_minutes, requires_photo)
  ),
  task_with_time AS (
    SELECT
      seq, title, description, planned_minutes, requires_photo,
      '08:00:00'::time + (
        COALESCE(
          SUM(planned_minutes) OVER (ORDER BY seq ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING),
          0
        ) || ' minutes'
      )::interval AS time_start,
      '08:00:00'::time + (
        COALESCE(
          SUM(planned_minutes) OVER (ORDER BY seq ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
          0
        ) || ' minutes'
      )::interval AS time_end
    FROM task_defs
  )
INSERT INTO tasks (
  id, title, description, planned_minutes,
  creator_id, assignee_id,
  state, review_state, acceptance_policy, requires_photo,
  shift_id, work_type_id, zone_id, category_id,
  time_start, time_end, source, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
  gen_random_uuid(),
  twt.title,
  twt.description,
  twt.planned_minutes,
  {{ $('Get John Doe Manager').item.json.user_id }},
  {{ $('Get John Doe Manager').item.json.user_id }},
  'NEW',
  'NONE',
  'MANUAL',
  twt.requires_photo,
  {{ $json.id }},
  (SELECT id FROM wt WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % wt_cnt.n + 1)),
  (SELECT id FROM z  WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % z_cnt.n + 1)),
  (SELECT id FROM c  WHERE rn = ((twt.seq - 1) % c_cnt.n + 1)),
  twt.time_start,
